title: Tinubu Government Has Trapped INEC; Amupitan Cannot Give Nigerians Free, Fair Elections — Sowore - SAHARA REPORTERS
content:
Human rights activist and former presidential candidate, Omoyele Sowore, has said that Nigeria’s Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) is effectively trapped under the control of the administration of President Bola Tinubu.

Sowore noted that INEC Chairman, Prof Joash Amupitan could not do anything different from his predecessors as he lacks the independence to deliver free, fair, and credible elections to Nigerians.
